macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Markets Mixed on March 24 Amid Middle East Tensions
items.summary: The Russell 2000 rose 0.45% to close at 2,505.44, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.18% or 84 points to 46,124.06. Stocks declined after recovering on Monday due to renewed conflict in the Middle East.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: New Bitcoin and Crypto ETFs Launched Amid Market Surge
items.summary: Major developments include the launch of new Bitcoin ETFs and spot/index cryptocurrency ETFs, enhancing institutional access and legitimacy for major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum. This is expected to intensify competition among ETFs and facilitate integration by banks and brokers.

items.title: Ethereum's Value Shifts to Network Fundamentals
items.summary: Ethereum's price is increasingly driven by DeFi activity, stablecoin turnover, tokenization of traditional assets, and competition from Layer 1 networks, reducing reliance on market narratives.

items.title: Europe Advances Stablecoins and Tokenization Agenda
items.summary: European discussions focus on stablecoins' growing role in international transfers, DeFi, and tokenized assets, positioning them as a core settlement layer and boosting infrastructural blockchains.

items.title: Bitcoin Maintains Dominant Market Share as ETFs See Inflows
items.summary: Ongoing inflows into cryptocurrency ETFs are supporting Bitcoin's high market capitalization share, with investors monitoring capital rotation into altcoins and regulatory developments in stablecoins.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: GCI and UK Met Office Host AI Climate Hackathon
items.summary: The Wits Global Change Institute and UK Met Office hosted a week-long hackathon on March 25, 2026, to advance AI and machine learning in climate modeling. The event trained 30 participants from South African institutions to enhance regional expertise for real-world climate decisions.

items.title: Vertafore Wins AI Excellence Award for Insurance Innovation
items.summary: Vertafore was recognized by the Business Intelligence Group on March 25, 2026, as a top AI innovator for deploying AI tools that streamline insurance workflows, predict client churn, and boost productivity. The award highlights measurable outcomes from AI investments started in 2017.

items.title: Concerns Rise Over AI Use in K-12 Education Harming Learning
items.summary: A March 25, 2026, article warns that increasing AI use by teachers and students in K-12 education may harm long-term learning, with studies showing worse performance after AI dependency and parental concerns over weakened academic skills. Only 35% of districts provided AI training in 2025.

items.title: CoreWeave Expands AI Cloud with NVIDIA HGX B300 at GTC
items.summary: CoreWeave announced on March 24, 2026, an expansion of its AI cloud platform featuring NVIDIA HGX B300 for enhanced AI workloads and new Weights & Biases tools for reinforcement learning. This follows multi-industry AI adoption driving U.S. markets past $40B.

items.title: DigitalOcean Boosts Workato's AI Agent Development
items.summary: DigitalOcean reported on March 24, 2026, that Workato's AI Research Lab achieved 67% lower inference costs, 67% higher throughput, and 77% faster response times using its NVIDIA Hopper GPU platform for Llama-3.3-70B models.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: AMD Launches Ryzen AI 400 Series Processors
items.summary: AMD released the Ryzen AI 400 series on March 25, 2026, marking the first desktop processors designed for Microsoft Copilot+ with a triple-engine architecture including Zen 5 CPU, RDNA 3.5 graphics, and XDNA 2 NPU, supporting up to 60 NPU TOPS for local processing of large models.

items.title: Meta Reveals New Generations of Custom MTIA Chips
items.summary: Meta announced four new generations of custom AI chips—MTIA 300, 400, 450, and 500—on March 11, 2026, with the MTIA 400 in internal testing offering competitive performance to reduce reliance on NVIDIA.
